description: NewRET mapping: generate RETConfigWDTInternal (Internal sheet) from the CDD '4G CDD' sheet. Simpler than ../01.RET: no 3G sheet, no Local Cell ID band lookup, and a fixed set of 4 RET devices per sector. Band/sector come straight from CellName (New)[Key].

source._note: Columns are located by HEADER NAME (case/whitespace tolerant), so extra/reordered CDD columns don't break parsing. The 4G CDD sheet has a category row above the real header row; the header row is found by locating the cell_name column.

site_type.note: Rows whose Site Type equals (case-insensitive, exact) one of skip_values are ignored entirely — nothing is emitted for them. Exact match, so 'Macro+IBC', 'CRAN-IBC', 'CRAN-R+IBC' etc. are NOT skipped; only a standalone 'IBC'.

Y.meaning: last char of CellName -> sector letter

band_freq._note: Reference only: the band letter X -> frequency. Used to pick which CDD row's E_TILT feeds each device (see devices[].tilt_band).

sector_rule.note: Y (last char of CellName) -> base sector number: a digit 1-9 is that number; a letter A-I maps to 1-9 (A=S1 ... D=S4 ... I=S9). A co-located offset is then added: if LEFT(NEName_New, match_prefix_len) == LEFT(CellName, match_prefix_len) the cell is the NE's OWN site and keeps its base number (S1,S2,S3,...); otherwise it is a co-located neighbour and gets +colocated_offset (S1->S4, S2->S5, S3->S6). sector_id = S{n}; rru_srn = srn_base + (n - 1) (S1=60, S2=61, ...). NOTE: match_prefix_len is 8 (the site code length); char 9 of NEName_New is the '_'/'-' separator, so a length of 9 never matches. Anything outside 1..max_sectors (e.g. 'M', 'X', dashed VNP names) is skipped. EXCEPTION (digit_from_logical_sector_id): when RIGHT(CellName,1) is a DIGIT, the letter/offset rule does NOT apply; the sector is taken from RIGHT(Logical Sector ID (Site), 1) instead — e.g. LSID '3.1' -> S1, '3.2' -> S2, '3' -> S3 (last char of the LSID = sector number n; rru_srn = srn_base + (n-1); no co-located offset). Falls back to the digit-of-CellName rule only if the Logical Sector ID is blank/unusable.

bbu_cluster.note: GUI filter: the distinct BBU Cluster values of the 4G CDD are offered for (multi) selection; only sectors whose BBU Cluster is selected are emitted. No selection = all clusters.

columns.rru_name: RCU所在扇区名称 / RRU Name(*)
columns.rcu_tilt: 电调天线角度 / RCU Tilt(*) unit=0.1度

site_name.note: Site Name(*) is NEName_New from the CDD, taken verbatim.

rru_name.note: Prefix = the part of SiteName (RRU Location)_New before the first of any delimiter char. e.g. HNITLM06_LN -> HNITLM06 -> {prefix}_L1800_S1_1.

rcu_tilt.note: E_TILT is taken from the CDD row of the device's tilt_band (fallback tilt_fallback). Lb1 & CRb3 & Rb4 use band C (1800Mhz F1); CLb2 uses band D (1800Mhz F2).

device_name.note: Device Name (col H) == RRU Name (col B).

text_config.description: RET_template.txt -> RET_output.txt (ADD RET / MOD RETTILT MML). DEVICENAME prefix, SERIALNO and TILT are rewritten from RET_input.txt + the CDD-derived rows.

site_match.note: 'field' is the 4G CDD column the RET-input site name (line 1) is matched against to find the CDD sector, AND which supplies the SITE token of the rewritten DEVICENAME prefix: 'ne_name' = NEName_New (default, e.g. HNIPTH01_LN); 'site_new' = SiteName (RRU Location)_New (e.g. HNIPTH01). 'include_ne_id' appends _{Ne ID} to that token; false to match templates whose DEVICENAME is {site}_{band}_{sector}_{slot} with no Ne ID.

input._note: RET_input.txt: line 1 = site name (== CDD SiteName_New); remaining lines are whitespace/tab separated. Indices are 0-based after splitting.

template._note: prefix_token_count = number of leading underscore tokens of DEVICENAME (the site prefix) that get replaced; the band/sector/slot suffix is kept. The template DEVICENAME is {site}_{band}_{sector}_{slot} (no Ne ID), so only the 1 leading site token is replaced.

rules.devicename: Replace the leading {prefix_token_count} token(s) of DEVICENAME with the site_match prefix (NEName_New by default, no Ne ID); keep the band/sector/slot suffix from the template.
rules.serialno: Replace SERIALNO with the input serial whose (CTRLSRN, RIGHT(serial, serial_suffix_len)) matches the template line's (CTRLSRN, RIGHT(SERIALNO, serial_suffix_len)).
rules.tilt: MOD RETTILT TILT = the RCU Tilt of the ADD RET device with the same DEVICENO, matched positionally: CTRLSRN -> sector_id, plus the device's order within that sector (1st..4th) -> that sector's device RCU Tilt.
